song.title: THE BEAUTY OF SIMPLICITY
song.lyrics: [V1] It’s the beauty of simplicity That brings me down to my knees. I’ll praise You for eternity. And Lord, I love You Because You, You first loved me. [V2] It’s the beauty of simplicity That fills me with eternity; I’ve tasted Your divinity. And Lord,I love You Because You, You first loved me. [C] And all God’s people say: We, we love You, we love You, Lord, we love You. And we, we love You, we love You, Lord, we love You, we love You. [B] You gave Yourself away just that I could stay. You took my place in death and rose that I could say
